title: Fasting
intro: Fasting isn't just food. The Prophet ﷺ taught that the eyes, ears, hands, and tongue each have a share in the fast. Track all five today.
categoryCardBody: Log your fast for the eyes, ears, hands, tongue, and food across the day.
last7Legend: The darker the square, the more parts kept that day.
hadithArabic: مَنْ لَمْ يَدَعْ قَوْلَ الزُّورِ وَالْعَمَلَ بِهِ فَلَيْسَ لِلَّهِ حَاجَةٌ فِي أَنْ يَدَعَ طَعَامَهُ وَشَرَابَهُ
hadithTranslation: Whoever does not give up false speech and acting on it — Allah has no need that he give up his food and drink.

eyes.title: Eyes
eyes.body: Lowering the gaze from haram — screens, people, content.

ears.title: Ears
ears.body: No gheebat, no gossip, no music that pulls you under.

hands.title: Hands
hands.body: No harming, no taking what isn't yours, no idle scrolling.

tongue.title: Tongue
tongue.body: No lying, no backbiting, no arguing for the sake of it.

food.title: Food & drink
food.body: The classic fast — from dawn to sunset, or whatever window you keep.
